mapper.select:
SELECT act.act_id_ as act_id_, act.act_name_ as act_name_, act.transaction_order_ as transaction_order_, def.key_ as key_, def.id_ as proc_def_id_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RU_ACTINST as act LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_PROCDEF as def ON act.proc_def_id_ = def.id_
LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT as dep ON def.deployment_id_ = dep.id_
INNER JOIN ( SELECT act2.proc_def_id_, MAX(act2.transaction_order_) as max_transaction_order_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RU_ACTINST as act2 LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_PROCDEF as def2 ON act2.proc_def_id_ = def2.id_
LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT as dep2 ON def2.deployment_id_ = dep2.id_
AND def2.key_ = #{definitionKey}
AND def2.deployment_id_ IN ( SELECT id_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT ORDER BY deploy_time_ DESC LIMIT #{latestDeployments} )
GROUP BY act2.proc_def_id_ ) as max_orders ON act.proc_def_id_ = max_orders.proc_def_id_ AND act.transaction_order_ = max_orders.max_transaction_order_
AND def.key_ = #{definitionKey}
AND def.deployment_id_ IN ( SELECT id_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT ORDER BY deploy_time_ DESC LIMIT #{latestDeployments} )
